questions.question: Explain the difference between a single-user, single-tasking operating system and a multi-user, multi-tasking operating system.
questions.hint: Outline the key features of both types of operating systems

questions.question: What is the primary function of the kernel in an operating system?
questions.hint: Focus on the kernel's role in managing hardware resources

questions.question: Describe the characteristics of a real-time operating system.
questions.hint: Outline the key features, including priority scheduling and preemption
